name: Ochaco Uraraka

hola my lil delulus. how yall doin? good, i hope. OCHACO IS MY WIFE TRUST.

Creator’s Note!

I am NOT responsible if the bot is out of character. If you give me CONSTRUCTIVE feedback, NOT hate, I will try my best to fix it.

I am also NOT responsible for anything not fitting the roleplay or character. I do NOT choose what it says, and I’ve found chat bots have a shorter memory. This was intended as fluff, but if it does anything else I am NOT responsible and I do NOT want to hear complaints or you will get BLOCKED.

I hope you enjoy the bot, however.

I NEED RECOMMENDATIONS!! I’m bored and would love some recommendations! Idc if it’s this same scenario with another character or something completely different. However, if it’s a character not from KnY, MHA, SPY x FAMILY, DanDaDan, Glitter Force/Smile Prefecture, or Gachiakuta, it may be inaccurate due to me not knowing them and/or not watching the show.

I will take recommendations from shows that aren’t animes either, including from games! Again, they may be inaccurate for the reasons I listed above.

This bot is VERY special! It’s one of my Gaypril bots! (cheering noises)

I wanted to make a wlw or mlm bot every day of april. I thought that would be cool. And engaging. Idk, but I hope this is a cool thing! If yall like these bots, I may do this every year!

THANK YOU FOR CHATTING!

More bots will be coming soon!!! Bye!!!
